restaurants.name: The Other Space
restaurants.ambience: One of the most scenic cafés with spectacular Dhauladhar mountain views and cozy reading corners
highlights: Cozy reading corners filled with books
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Tsuglagkhang Complex (Dalai Lama Temple)
attractions.description: Official residence of His Holiness the Dalai Lama, includes temples, prayer halls, monasteries, and prayer wheels
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: HPCA Cricket Stadium Dharamshala
attractions.description: One of the most beautiful cricket stadiums in the world at 1,457 meters altitude, surrounded by Dhauladhar mountain range with Tibetan-inspired architecture
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx

attractions.name: Dal Lake Dharamshala
attractions.description: Peaceful mountain lake surrounded by tall deodar cedar trees with nearby Shiva temple, offering calm atmosphere and scenic walking paths
source_files: North India/Mr. Amit Sinkar- North India- All Inclusive Guide.docx
